meaning: n.婴儿内衣(无袖,两肩常用纽扣) Gertrude 格特鲁德(女子名)
examples: The first woman to cross the English channel was Gertrude.
The first woman to cross the English Channel was Gertrude Ederle in 1926.
Patient: What was the big deal with Gertrude Stein?
We dug in, hoping Miguel and Gertrude were enjoying their dinners just as much.
The scene in Gertrude's bedroom when he challenges her on her "incestuous" bed is menacingly powerful.
